name: Booking Holdings
analysis: BKNG's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 27% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $170.0250, stop $156.5388, target $193.4337 (1.74:1) — then trail it.
